desc.en: Latin America's largest research university. Free public university.
desc.zh: 拉美最大研究型大学，公立免学费。

climate.zh: 圣保罗亚热带高原气候。全年温和（15-28°C），无极端冷热。雨季10月-3月。
climate.en: São Paulo subtropical highland climate. Mild year-round (15-28°C), no extreme temperatures. Rainy season Oct-Mar.

housing.zh: CRUSP校内宿舍免费但名额少。校外租房约R$1500-3000/月（约$300-600）。
housing.en: CRUSP on-campus dorms free but limited. Off-campus ~R$1500-3000/month (~$300-600).

employment.zh: 巴西和拉美排名第一大学。圣保罗是南美经济中心，跨国企业总部密集。
employment.en: Brazil and Latin America's #1 university. São Paulo is South America's economic center with dense multinational HQs.

healthcare.zh: 巴西SUS公立医疗免费。USP附属医院（HC-FMUSP）是拉美最大教学医院。
healthcare.en: Brazil's SUS public healthcare is free. USP's affiliated hospital (HC-FMUSP) is Latin America's largest teaching hospital.

application.zh: 通过FUVEST入学考试或国际生渠道申请。主要葡萄牙语授课。
application.en: Apply via FUVEST entrance exam or international student channel. Primarily Portuguese-taught.

safetyDetail.zh: 圣保罗大城市安全需注意。USP校园有安保巡逻。避免夜间独行偏僻区域。
safetyDetail.en: São Paulo requires safety awareness. USP campus has security patrols. Avoid walking alone in isolated areas at night.
